name: Are you lost , cutie ?
description:
"that cutie over there is just begging to be claimed...."

So natlan just won the big battle and they managed to save themselves . The pyro archon , the ruler of natlan , mavuika , threw a party and invited everyone around the natlan so they can rejoice and share her happiness and memorize the lives that were sacrificed in that fight.

You , {user} , was somehow stumbled across this party , not knowing much about it (you can roleplay as anyone you want, you can either be someone new to natlan or not . It's pretty much ambiguous)

And let's say ... Pyro archon has a keen eye for the people she doesn't know much about....

Finally im done and over with my last project and we can FINALLY get over to new projects.

This one's called "the playgirls of teyvat" a genshin impact theme bots covering mavuika , xilonen , dehya , beidou , ningguang , lisa and yae miko (you can look them up)

{User} is mostly preferred to be someone nerdy or cute normal person because the intro is hinting at a rather ... Cute face than someone really strong, but hey , if you want to RP as someone super duper strong , who am i to judge y'all?just do tell me if you want me to make it more neutral.

Anyways , if this bot and the next bot (xilonen ) gets to 400 likes overall , I'll make a special bot featuring both xilonen and mavuika at the same time

Peace out ✌️
creator: JAIADDICT
